description: Event handler that manages weapon heat mechanics for heat-based weapon systems. Tracks heat accumulation on weapon use and enforces cooling/overheat restrictions.

handler_fields.name: OwnerSkill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler (parent weapon skill)

handler_fields.name: EffectData
handler_fields.description: Reference to the HeatCapacity ScriptableObject effect data containing configuration

handler_fields.name: CurrentHeat
handler_fields.description: Current accumulated heat value. Reset to 0 on mission start. Increases by HeatPerUse on each weapon fire.

handler_fields.name: HeatPerUse
handler_fields.description: Heat added per weapon use. Copied from effect data offset 0x58.

handler_fields.name: MaxHeat
handler_fields.description: Maximum heat capacity. When CurrentHeat >= MaxHeat, weapon overheats. Copied from effect data offset 0x5c.

handler_fields.name: CooldownPerRound
handler_fields.description: Heat reduction per round start. Negative values = cooling. Copied from effect data offset 0x60.

effect_data_fields.name: CooldownPerRound
effect_data_fields.description: Heat change per round (negative = cooling, positive = heating)

effect_data_fields.name: SyncHeatAcrossSkills
effect_data_fields.description: When true, synchronizes heat value across all skills with HeatCapacityHandler on the same actor

effect_data_fields.name: OverheatingSoundID
effect_data_fields.description: 3D positional audio played when weapon overheats

related_handlers.name: VentHeatHandler
related_handlers.description: Companion handler that allows manual heat venting. Links to HeatCapacityHandler via LinkedSkillTemplate field.

effect_data_fields.name: LinkedSkillTemplate
effect_data_fields.description: Reference to skill template containing the HeatCapacityHandler to vent

related_handlers.name: ChangeHeatCapacityHandler
related_handlers.description: Modifier handler that can adjust HeatCapacityHandler values at runtime (e.g., for upgrades/buffs).

effect_data_fields.name: ChangeHeatPerUse
effect_data_fields.description: Delta value to add to HeatPerUse

effect_data_fields.name: ChangeMaxHeat
effect_data_fields.description: Delta value to add to MaxHeat

effect_data_fields.name: ChangeCooldown
effect_data_fields.description: Delta value to add to CooldownPerRound

key_methods.name: OnAdded
key_methods.description: Initializes handler from effect data. Copies MaxHeat, HeatPerUse, CooldownPerRound from effect data. Resets CurrentHeat to 0.

key_methods.name: OnRoundStart
key_methods.description: Applies cooling: CurrentHeat = max(0, CurrentHeat + CooldownPerRound). Shows 'Overheating' UI text if still overheated.

key_methods.name: OnUse (AddHeat)
key_methods.description: Adds heat when weapon fires: CurrentHeat += HeatPerUse. Syncs heat across skills, plays overheat sound if >= MaxHeat.

key_methods.name: IsUsable
key_methods.description: Returns true if CurrentHeat + HeatPerUse <= MaxHeat. Prevents firing when would exceed capacity.

key_methods.name: Synchronize
key_methods.description: Syncs CurrentHeat value to all other HeatCapacityHandlers on same actor (when SyncHeatAcrossSkills enabled)

key_methods.name: SetMaxHeat
key_methods.description: Sets MaxHeat to max(0, value). Used by ChangeHeatCapacity effect.

key_methods.name: PlayOverheatSound
key_methods.description: Plays OverheatingSoundID (effect+0x68) as 3D positional audio at actor location

key_discoveries.details: When SyncHeatAcrossSkills (0x64) is enabled, the Synchronize method propagates CurrentHeat to all HeatCapacityHandlers on the same actor. This enables linked weapon systems that share heat pools.
CooldownPerRound can be negative (cooling) or positive (continuous heat buildup). Default -1 means weapons cool by 1 heat per round.
VentHeatHandler uses LinkedSkillTemplate (0x58) to find the target skill, then retrieves its HeatCapacityHandler via GetEventHandlerOfType. This allows vent skills to be decoupled from weapon skills.
AI reload behavior (ConsiderHeatCapacity) evaluates heat weapons differently, calculating remaining uses and scaling reload priority based on heat percentage and action point costs.
When overheated, displays 'Overheating' dropdown text via UnitHUD.ShowDropDownText using UIConfig color scheme (0x588 offset in UIConfig).
ChangeHeatCapacityHandler provides runtime modification of heat parameters via additive deltas, enabling upgrades and buffs that modify weapon heat characteristics.

ghidra_comments_added: 0x1807073c0 - HeatCapacity Effect Data Constructor with field documentation
0x1807072b0 - HeatCapacityHandler Constructor with handler field documentation
